parameters: It looks like the factory is collapsing!
No...! The exit is blocked by rubble! How am I supposed to get out now?!
I have to find another way out.
...So you are the one behind all of this.
The waste... the monsters... the poisoned river...
Was all of this your doing?!
...I cannot let you leave this place.
I cannot beat this thing head-on.
Where is my Shii...? I cannot find it anywhere here.
Why is it not here...? What am I missing?
Could it have ended up in the next village...?
I need to get out of this factory before it collapses.
Where is my Shii...? I cannot find it anywhere here.
Why is it not here...? What am I missing?
Could it have ended up in the next village...?
I need to get out of this factory before it collapses.
If Zuko were still here, he could probably break this rock.
We would have been able to escape through this path.
I have to find another way out.
